title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Delhi - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS Delhi - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Doctor to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!
